BookingId.description: The unique ID of the booking

GameId.description: The unique ID of the game tied to this booking

Type.description: The type of booking. Possible values: Yellow Card, Red Card, Yellow Red Card

TeamId.description: The unique ID of the team associated with this booking

PlayerId.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID stays with the player their entire career

Name.description: The full name of the player who was booked

GameMinute.description: The minute in the game in which the booking occurred

GameMinuteExtra.description: The extra minute in the game in which the booking occurred
